REMOTE CONTRACT OPPORTUNITIES | AI/ML Engineer & Data Engineer | Immediate Joiners
🚀 We are #hiring for high-impact remote contract roles with an immediate start.
If you have strong hands-on experience in AI/ML systems, Generative AI, or scalable data pipelines, this is your chance to work on exciting enterprise projects.

🤖 AI/ML Engineer | 8+ Years
📍 Location: Remote
🕒 Shift: 11:30 AM – 8:30 PM
📅 Duration: 6 Months (Extendable)
⚡ Notice Period: Immediate

✅ Must-Have Skills
✔ Python + Deep Learning Frameworks
✔ LLM / Generative AI Experience
✔ LangChain / AI Agents
✔ Production ML Pipelines
✔ Cloud / Distributed ML
✔ TensorFlow, PyTorch, NumPy, JAX, Scikit-Learn
✔ Regression, Classification, Clustering, Forecasting
✔ Real-time Inference Systems
✔ End-to-End ML Architecture

🎯 Looking for experts who can build, scale, and optimize production-grade ML systems with strong engineering depth.

📊 Data Engineer | 7+ Years
📍 Location: Remote
📅 Duration: 6 Months (Extendable)
⚡ Notice Period: Immediate

✅ Must-Have Skills
✔ Databricks
✔ PySpark
✔ Batch & Streaming Pipelines
✔ Apache Kafka
✔ GitHub / GitHub Actions / Azure DevOps
✔ CI/CD for Data Pipelines
✔ Data Validation & Quality Checks
✔ Monitoring, Logging, SLA Tracking
✔ Lakehouse / Data Warehousing Concepts
⭐ Good to Have: MongoDB, NoSQL, Data Governance, Data Modeling, Spark Streaming

📩 Interested or know someone who fits?
Drop a DM with your updated CV or submit at:
Submit.bizsot.com
Immediate joiners will be given preference.


#Syed Ali #Bizsot #Hiring #RemoteJobs #AIMLEngineer #DataEngineer #MachineLearning #ArtificialIntelligence #TechJobs #ContractHiring #ImmediateJoiners

extracted.full_content:
Human Resources Manager at Innowrap Technologies

🚀 Hiring: Senior Data Scientist (AI/ML) – Contract Role | Bangalore
We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist (AI/ML) with strong experience in Generative AI and Machine Learningto design and deploy cutting-edge AI solutions that solve real-world business challenges.
📍 Location: Bangalore (Only Bangalore-based candidates should apply)
💼 Role Type: Contractual
👨‍💻 Experience Required: 5+ Years
🔍 Role Overview
As a Senior Data Scientist, you will work on building advanced AI/ML and Generative AI solutions, including LLM-powered applications and intelligent agent systems. This role requires hands-on expertise in model development, production deployment, and collaboration with engineering and product teams.
⚡ Key Responsibilities
• Design, develop, and optimize Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Generative AI models
• Build Agentic AI systems using frameworks like ADK, LangGraph, or similar orchestration frameworks
• Develop solutions leveraging LLMs, RAG pipelines, embeddings, and vector databases
• Apply NLP techniques such as classification, summarization, entity recognition, and semantic search
• Build scalable algorithms for search, retrieval, and real-time inference
• Integrate AI microservices into enterprise systems using APIs and event-driven architectures
• Deploy AI workloads using Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
• Optimize models for performance, cost efficiency, latency, and security
• Manage and preprocess large datasets for training, fine-tuning, and inference
• Monitor, evaluate, and improve models and prompts for accuracy and scalability
• Collaborate with engineers, architects, and business stakeholders to deliver production-ready AI solutions
• Promote Responsible AI practices, including fairness, bias mitigation, and compliance
🧠 Required Skills
• Strong programming skills in Python and SQL
• Experience with ML frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch
• Deep understanding of Generative AI concepts (Transformers, embeddings, fine-tuning)
• Experience with Agentic AI frameworks such as ADK, LangGraph, AutoGen
• Hands-on experience with LLMs, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, and vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate)
• Experience deploying AI solutions on AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Knowledge of microservices architecture and API-driven design
🎓 Qualifications
• Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or related field
• 5+ years of hands-on experience in AI/ML development and deployment
• Proven experience building LLM and Generative AI applications
📩 Interested candidates based in Bangalore can share their resume via LinkedIn DM or email at hr8@innowrap.com
#Hiring #DataScientist #AI #MachineLearning #GenerativeAI #LLM #BangaloreJobs #TechHiring

Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist @ Tachyon Technologies | Building Diverse Talent Pipelines

🚀 Hiring: AI/ML Engineer | Remote (India)
We are looking for an experienced AI/ML Engineer to join our team and build scalable machine learning solutions for enterprise applications.
📍 Location: Remote (India)
💼 Experience: 7–10+ Years
🕒 Employment Type: Contract-to-Hire (C2H)
🔹 Job Responsibilities:
• Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models and AI solutions
• Work with large datasets and build predictive models using advanced ML algorithms
• Collaborate with data scientists, engineers, and business teams to deliver AI-driven insights
• Implement data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model optimization
• Deploy ML models in production using cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
• Monitor model performance and improve accuracy and scalability
🔹 Required Skills:
• Strong experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and AI frameworks
• Proficiency in Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn
• Experience with Data Engineering, NLP, or Computer Vision
• Hands-on experience with MLOps, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines
• Experience with Cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
• Strong knowledge of statistics, algorithms, and data structures
🔹 Preferred Qualifications:
• Experience with LLMs, Generative AI, or NLP models
• Familiarity with Big Data tools like Spark / Hadoop
• Excellent problem-solving and communication skills
📩 Interested candidates can share their updated resume to:
azrath.k@tachyontech.com

Most Urgent Position C2C...

Role : AI/ML Engineering
 Location : 100% Remote
 Position Type : Long Term Contract

 Job Description :
 The Engineering AI/ML Manager (GL 28) is a hands-on technical leader responsible for delivering AI/ML solutions from design through production while managing a small team of engineers. This role balances people leadership, technical depth, and delivery accountability, and is ideal for a manager who still codes, reviews designs, and actively guides implementation.
This role supports enterprise AI initiatives across machine learning, generative AI, LLM based solutions, and data driven automation, aligned with healthcare and regulated industry standards.

Key Responsibilities
Technical Leadership & Delivery
• Lead the design, development, and deployment of AI/ML solutions in production environments.
• Guide architecture decisions for ML pipelines, model deployment, and inference at scale.
• Review and approve technical designs, code, and model implementation approaches.
• Ensure solutions meet security, reliability, scalability, and responsible AI standards.
• Partner with architects and platform teams on cloud-based AI implementations (Azure preferred).People & Team Management
• Manage and mentor a team of AI/ML engineers (onshore and offshore).
• Support sprint planning, backlog prioritization, and delivery commitments.
• Conduct performance coaching, skill development, and technical mentoring.
• Foster strong collaboration across engineering, data, product, and business teams.
AI / ML Engineering Execution
• Oversee development of: 
o Machine learning models (supervised / unsupervised)
o Generative AI and LLM based solutions
o Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
o Model deployment and monitoring workflows
• Promote MLOps best practices including CI/CD, model versioning, monitoring, and retraining.
• Translate business problems into AI/ML technical solutions.
• Communicate progress, risks, and outcomes to technical and non technical stakeholders.

Required Qualifications
• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Data Science, or related field.
• 7–10 years of overall engineering experience with 3+ years in AI/ML engineering.
• 2+ years of people or technical team leadership experience.
• Strong hands-on experience with: 
o Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit learn)
o Cloud platforms (Azure preferred)
o ML model deployment and product ionization
• Experience building and deploying LLM or GenAI solutions is strongly preferred.
• Solid understanding of data pipelines, APIs, and distributed systems.

Preferred Qualifications
• Experience with healthcare, payer, or regulated industries.
• Exposure to Responsible AI, model governance, and compliance reviews.
• Familiarity with vector databases, embeddings, and RAG architectures.
• Experience managing mixed onshore/offshore delivery teams.


If anyone interested, please share your resume at shivani@excelonsolutions.com.
